description_long: This is a wooden desk with a natural light finish, featuring a flat rectangular work surface and a set of three drawers on the left side, each with a visible handle. On the right side, there is a larger cabinet door, also with a handle, likely for additional storage. The desk has an open space in the center for legroom, and the top surface is occupied by a laptop, speakers, and a few small accessories. The construction appears sturdy, with the wood grain visible throughout, and the desk sits directly on a wooden floor. The overall design is functional and practical, suitable for both work and study environments.
description: A light wood desk with three drawers, a cabinet, and a spacious work surface, featuring visible handles and a natural finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full desk, three drawers on the left, a cabinet on the right, and a laptop with accessories on top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the top surface, with the drawers and cabinet less visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the open leg space beneath the desk and the back of the cabinet and drawers.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the cabinet side and the edge of the work surface, with the laptop visible on top.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features three drawers on the left and a cabinet on the right, with an open central space for seating; the back is plain and intended to face a wall.
